description: Rules for creating, managing, and maintaining summary pages in wiki/syntheses/. Defines creation triggers, lifecycle rules, frontmatter requirements.

creation_triggers.details: Establish internal links (crosslinks), add external sources via ingest flow

creation_triggers.alternative: just answer, possibly add to existing entity/concept

lifecycle_rules.details: -50% popularity boost; merge into fresher page or delete if duplicate

lifecycle_rules.when: topic exists but new query leads to different top_path

required_fields.description: Must include summary and faq tags

agent_autonomy_scope: creates pages autonomously based on creation triggers
removes stale pages per decay rules

integration_with_ingest.user_proposed_and_approved: transition to process-ingest.json via web_ingest_flow → user_confirm_passed
